title: gCAPS
description: Reimplementation of the Gboard CAPS in Minecraft
body:
# gCAPS
Fashionable Hats! gCAPS is a reimplementation of the **[Gboard CAPS](https://landing.google.co.jp/caps/)** in Minecraft with the **Atama Input**.  
Model based on the [Gboard CAPS Cardboard DIY Tutorial](https://archive.google/caps/static/assets/gboard_caps_cardboard.pdf)

Supports Minecraft >= 1.20 with the Fabric/Quilt modloader.

![User interface of Atama Input, and the look of the caps from the side](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmberIsFrozen/gcaps-fabric/main/assets/thumbnail.png)

## Crafting Recipe
![Crafting recipe of the Gboard CAPS. 1st row: 3 Paper. 2nd row: 1 paper, 1 redstone, 1 paper. 3rd row: empty](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Kenny-Hui/gcaps-fabric/main/assets/recipe1.png)
![Crafting recipe of the Chin-Strapped variant. 1st row: 1 stick, 1 Gboard CAPS, 1 stick. 2nd row 1 stick, 1 empty, 1 stick, 3rd row empty](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmberIsFrozen/gcaps-fabric/main/assets/recipe2.png)

## Usage
1. Wear the Gboard CAPS
2. Press the Y key (Configurable in control settings)
3. Move your head around to select characters.
4. Left click to type, Middle click to change layout, Right click to send the message!

## Bugs/Suggestions
If you have any suggestions or bug report, don't hesitate to open an GitHub issue [here](https://github.com/AmberIsFrozen/gcaps-fabric/issues)!
